caption:
The local businesses that win Google search aren't the ones with the biggest budget. They're the ones whose Google Business Profile is actually finished. Here are 4 free fields most owners leave blank ↓

1. Primary category. The highest-weight field on the profile. Google uses it to decide which searches you show up for. Pick the most specific one that's accurate. Most owners set it once and never look again.

2. Photos. Google's ranking favours active profiles. A new photo every week is a steady signal you're open and operating, and it gives customers something to look at before they call.

3. Services and Products. Every service you list is another term Google can match you to. Free keyword space, and most profiles leave the whole section blank.

4. Google Posts. A sale, a seasonal note, a service update. They expire after 7 days, so it only works as a weekly habit. Almost nobody does it, which is what makes it an edge.

No budget needed. Just an afternoon and a habit.

When did you last open your Google Business Profile?
